subject: Unable to connect to VPN
body: I'm getting a timeout error when trying to connect to the company VPN. I've tried restarting my computer and checking my internet connection, but the issue persists. Error code: VPN_TIMEOUT_001
answer: The issue was resolved by updating the VPN client to version 3.2.1 and clearing the DNS cache using 'ipconfig /flushdns'. Also ensured that UDP port 500 and 4500 were not blocked by the firewall.

subject: Database query performance degradation
body: Our production database queries are running 10x slower than usual. The issue started around 3 AM today. Queries that normally take 2-3 seconds are now taking 20-30 seconds. This is affecting our customer-facing application.
answer: Performance issue was caused by missing indexes on the orders table after the recent migration. Created composite indexes on (customer_id, order_date) and (status, created_at). Also ran ANALYZE and VACUUM on affected tables. Query performance returned to normal levels.

subject: SSL certificate expiring soon
body: Received automated alert that our main domain SSL certificate (*.example.com) will expire in 7 days. Need to renew and deploy the new certificate to all production servers.
answer: Generated new SSL certificate using Let's Encrypt. Updated certificate on all load balancers and web servers. Verified HTTPS is working correctly across all subdomains. Set up automated renewal process using certbot with cron job.

subject: API rate limiting not working correctly
body: The API rate limiting middleware is not properly throttling requests. Some clients are exceeding the 1000 requests/hour limit without being blocked. Logs show rate limit counters are not incrementing correctly in Redis.
answer: Issue was caused by Redis key expiration not being set correctly. Updated the rate limiting middleware to use SETEX instead of SET for atomic expiration. Also implemented sliding window algorithm for more accurate rate limiting. Deployed fix to production and verified with load testing.

subject: Backup job failing on weekends
body: The automated database backup job has been failing every weekend for the past 3 weeks. Error logs indicate 'insufficient disk space' but monitoring shows 40% free space available on the backup server.
answer: Root cause was temporary files not being cleaned up during the backup process. Modified backup script to clean up temp files before starting new backup. Also increased disk space monitoring threshold and added alerts for backup job failures. Tested successfully over the weekend.
